Uniswap (UNI)

$245,000,000 USD

Total airdrop

12,803

Total Recipients

Who was eligible?

Any Ethereum wallet which has done one of the following before July 1, 2024:

  • One swap
  • Providing liquidity for any duration
  • Redeemed SOCKS token
  • Held one or more SOCKS tokens at the moment of the snapshot.

How many tokens per wallet?

4,000 UNI are claimable by every address that called the Uniswap contracts. This includes ~25,000 addresses that have only ever submitted failed transactions. 10 million UNI are claimable by liquidity providers. The formula for LP rewards is based upon total seconds as an LP. 2000 UNI are claimable by each address that has either redeemed SOCKS tokens or owned at least one SOCKS token.

Snapshot date

July 1, 2024

Airdrop Ends

Never

Current Average worth

$17,300

Average airdrop size

4,000 UNI

How to Claim

  1. Check all your wallets for a match on Earnifi.
  2. Click any matching links to navigate to the airdrop claim page.
  3. Click "Connect to a wallet" in the top-right.
  4. Click the pink "# UNI" in the top-right.
  5. Claim in the pop-up which appears.
